# Extenders & Multiviewers

![Network Technologies Inc Multiviewer](./product.png)

*Note: Product image needs to be obtained manually. Download from the product page and save as `product.png` or `product.jpg` in this directory.*

Network Technologies Inc (NTI) provides a wide variety of multiviewer and extender solutions for professional video applications in data centers, control rooms, and enterprise environments.

## Multiviewers

- **Quad Screen Splitters**: Available in various configurations including 4K 18Gbps HDMI and 3G-SDI multiviewers
- **4K HDMI Multiviewers**: High-resolution quad-screen splitter/multiviewers with built-in USB KVM switch capabilities
- **Video Matrix Switches**: 4x4 HDMI multiviewers that also function as video matrix switches and video wall processors
- **3G-SDI Multiviewers**: Professional broadcast-quality multiviewer solutions

## Extenders

- **KVM Extenders**: HDMI, DisplayPort, DVI, and VGA KVM extenders with IP and fiber optic options
- **4K HDMI Extenders**: High-bandwidth 4K 18Gbps extenders via CAT6/6a/7 cables
- **IP-Based Extenders**: Low-cost HDMI over Gigabit IP point-to-multipoint extenders
- **Fiber Optic Extenders**: Long-distance video and KVM extension via singlemode/multimode fiber

## Key Features

- Support for 4K 60Hz video resolutions
- Multiple input/output configurations
- Built-in USB KVM switching capabilities
- IP-based and fiber optic extension options
- Video wall processor functionality
- Remote power control integration

## Applications

- Data center monitoring and management
- Control room operations
- Digital signage deployments
- Command and control centers
- Professional video production environments

For more information and pricing, visit the [official product page](https://www.networktechinc.com/multiviewer.html).
